The nucleotide sequence of the trimethoprim-resistant dihydrofolate reductase gene harbored by Tn7.

label: DhfR
note: Type I (DfrA1) trimethoprim-resistant dihydrofolate reductase from transposon Tn7 — a 157-aa enzyme - a single FolA-fold catalytic domain (UniProt P00382); the catalogued allele carries an N73D sub...

label: DHFR conserved-site signature
note: PROSITE PS00075 / InterPro IPR017925 'Dihydrofolate reductase conserved site'.

label: Substrate/cofactor loop
note: N-terminal substrate/cofactor loop structurally equivalent to the catalytic Met20 loop of E.

label: Catalytic acidic residue
note: Catalytic Glu (context AKG-E-QLL) equivalent to the strictly conserved Asp27 of E.

label: Active-site residue
note: Gln immediately downstream of the catalytic Glu (the 'Q' of GEQLL), on helix B lining the trimethoprim subpocket.

label: Antifolate-stacking residue
note: Phe on helix B (context EQLL-F-KAIT) packing against the trimethoxyphenyl/benzyl ring of trimethoprim and the propargyl linker of propargyl-linked antifolates.

label: Hydrophobic inhibitor-pocket residues
note: Helix C hydrophobic wall of the dihydrofolate/trimethoprim binding pocket.

label: Conserved pteridine-binding glycine-rich turn
note: Conserved DHFR glycine-rich turn (G-G-G-x, context IVS-GGGE-IY) of the FolA family that contributes to the pteridine/substrate pocket.
